828.reason: [Incorrect lookahead logic: using peekSymbol(3) to decide Decl parsing is flawed because it doesn't properly check if the current token starts a VarDecl. Should use FirstSet.DeclFirst instead.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrect lookahead logic: using peekSymbol(3) to decide Decl parsing is flawed because it doesn't properly check if the current token starts a VarDecl. Should use FirstSet.DeclFirst instead.]

836.reason: [Incorrect lookahead logic: using peekSymbol(2) to decide FuncDef parsing is unreliable. Should check if current token is in FuncDefFirst set and ensure we're not at main function yet.]
